panes.name: api
panes.command: pier run --project pier-demo --env dev --api https://api.buildwithharbor.com -- sh -lc 'export API_URL="$DEV_API_URL" PUBLIC_API_URL="$DEV_API_URL" WEB_URL="$DEV_WEB_URL" PUBLIC_WEB_URL="$DEV_WEB_URL" ADMIN_URL="$DEV_ADMIN_URL" PUBLIC_ADMIN_URL="$DEV_ADMIN_URL"; pier dev api'

panes.name: web
panes.command: pier run --project pier-demo --env dev --api https://api.buildwithharbor.com -- sh -lc 'export PUBLIC_API_URL="$DEV_API_URL" PUBLIC_WEB_URL="$DEV_WEB_URL" PUBLIC_ZERO_CACHE_URL="$DEV_ZERO_URL"; pier dev web'

panes.name: admin
panes.command: pier run --project pier-demo --env dev --api https://api.buildwithharbor.com -- sh -lc 'export PUBLIC_API_URL="$DEV_API_URL" PUBLIC_ADMIN_URL="$DEV_ADMIN_URL" PUBLIC_WEB_URL="$DEV_WEB_URL"; pier dev admin'

panes.name: zero
panes.command: bun run zero:up && bun run zero:logs
